body: Lazy-load is in — wrapped the gallery images with loading="lazy" and added an IntersectionObserver fallback. Mobile first paint is way down.
Pushed the new Porch Light selects and updated the blurb. Take a look when you get a sec.
Confirmed on my Pixel — logo gets pushed off at about 430px. Working on a hamburger menu under 480.
Good idea — I'll add a /prints section that links straight to the Etsy listings.
